5 modern cards with rounded corners, colored icons, progress bars, and hover effects

Smooth navigation between Dashboard, Engins, Tags pages with proper active states
Manrope and Inter fonts properly implemented throughout the app

Navigation between Dashboard, Engins, and Tags pages
